sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_md5 (id INT, hash_value BIGINT);
INSERT INTO test_md5 (id, hash_value) VALUES (1, md5_number_lower('test string 1'));
UPDATE test_md5 SET hash_value = md5_number_lower('updated string') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hash_value FROM test_md5 WHERE hash_value = md5_number_lower('test string 1');
DELETE FROM test_md5 WHERE hash_value = md5_number_lower('non-existent string');
